nodes.name: Leistes
nodes.summary: Leistes（Leistes）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联5种鸟类，如紅胸草地鷚、白眉草地鷚、秘魯草地鷚等5种鸟类。

nodes.name: Pampas meadowlark
nodes.summary: The Pampas meadowlark (Leistes defilippii) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is scattered across the Pampas Plain. Its natural habitats are temperate shrubland, pampas grassland, subtropical or tropical dry lowland grassland, and pastureland. It is threatened by habitat loss. References External links Range of the Pampas meadowlark - Oiseaux.net
nodes.shortSummary: The Pampas meadowlark (Leistes defilippii) is a species of bird in the family Icteridae. It is scattered across the Pampas Plain.
